deep_dive.title: Dustin: Draft-Augmented Sparse Verification for Efficient Long-Context Generation with Speculative Decoding
deep_dive.abstract: While speculative decoding improves inference throughput for multi-batch long-context Large Language Models (LLMs), its efficiency is often limited by a verification bottleneck where Key-Value (KV) cache loading dominates latency. Existing compression methods fail in this regime: static eviction incurs accuracy loss due to saliency shift, while dynamic selection introduces prohibitive computational overhead during the verification path. We propose Dustin, a sparse verification framework designed for long-context speculative decoding. Dustin integrates lookahead signals from the draft model with historical attention from the target model to identify critical tokens with high fidelity across multi-step verification windows. To reduce recomputation latency, this approach further employs a sparse estimation scheme that restricts importance scoring to a minimal subset of attention heads. Evaluations on PG-19 and LongBench with Qwen2.5-72B demonstrate that Dustin achieves a 27.85x speedup in self-attention and a 9.17x end-to-end decoding speedup at a 32k sequence length, all with negligible accuracy degradation.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: speculative decoding with sparse verification for long-context LLM inference
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 面向长上下文LLM推理的稀疏验证投机解码
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 面向长上下文LLM推理的稀疏验证投机解码
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 面向长上下文LLM推理的稀疏验证投机解码
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Dustin introduces a draft-augmented sparse verification framework for long-context speculative decoding, addressing the KV cache loading bottleneck by integrating draft lookahead with target attention to identify critical tokens efficiently.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对长上下文投机解码中KV缓存加载成为验证瓶颈的问题，本文提出Dustin框架，利用草稿模型的超前信号与目标模型的历史注意力协同，高效识别关键令牌进行稀疏验证，在不损失准确性的前提下显著降低验证延迟，为LLM长序列推理加速提供了实用方案。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对长上下文投机解码中KV缓存加载成为验证瓶颈的问题，本文提出Dustin框架，利用草稿模型的超前信号与目标模型的历史注意力协同，高效识别关键令牌进行稀疏验证，在不损失准确性的前提下显著降低验证延迟，为LLM长序列推理加速提供了实用方案。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Papers central to 大语言模型高效推理相关的论文检索, especially work that connects or combines: efficient large language model inference techniques; KV cache optimization and management for LLM; speculative decoding for faster LLM inference; structured and unstructured pruning for LLMs; efficient attention mechanisms like FlashAttention or PagedAttention; survey on efficient inference of large language models; state of the art techniques for LLM inference acceleration; optimizing throughput and latency for LLM serving.

deep_dive.title: Position Rebinding Cache Reuse: Replay-Free Visual Revisiting for Interleaved Multimodal Reasoning
deep_dive.abstract: Interleaved multimodal reasoning improves visual grounding by revisiting visual evidence during multi-step generation, yet existing methods typically rely on token replay, repeatedly forwarding selected visual tokens. A natural shortcut is to reuse the historical visual key-value (KV) cache directly. However, we identify a critical failure mode of this strategy: cached visual keys are already bound to their original positional context. Such stale positional binding distorts attention under later decoding contexts and can trigger severe autoregressive decoding collapse. This failure suggests that effective cache reuse requires reconstructing visual evidence under positions compatible with the current decoding state, rather than directly copying position-bound historical cache entries. To this end, we propose Position Rebinding Cache Reuse (PRCR), a cache-level framework for replay-free visual revisiting. PRCR stores raw visual KV cache together with their original spatial coordinates, then reassigns position-compatible coordinates to select entries and rebinds their keys before injecting the reconstructed cache into the active decoder cache. This design reuses historical visual evidence while preserving textual positional continuity and relative visual structure. Experiments across multiple multimodal reasoning benchmarks show that PRCR achieves replay-level or better performance, improving average accuracy by 5 percent and reducing visual-revisiting computation by up to tens of thousands of times.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Proposes a KV cache reuse technique for interleaved multimodal reasoning, addressing the stale positional binding problem to enable efficient visual revisiting without token replay.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 提出针对交错多模态推理的KV缓存重用方法，解决位置绑定失效问题，实现无需重放的视觉回溯加速。
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 提出针对交错多模态推理的KV缓存重用方法，解决位置绑定失效问题，实现无需重放的视觉回溯加速。
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 提出针对交错多模态推理的KV缓存重用方法，解决位置绑定失效问题，实现无需重放的视觉回溯加速。
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Position Rebinding Cache Reuse identifies that direct KV cache reuse in interleaved multimodal reasoning fails due to stale positional binding, and proposes a method to reconstruct visual evidence under current decoding positions, enabling efficient replay-free visual revisiting.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 交错多模态推理中重用历史视觉KV缓存可以避免重复前向计算，但现有方法因缓存中位置绑定信息过时而导致注意力错乱甚至解码崩溃。本文提出位置重绑定缓存重用方法，通过调整缓存中的位置编码使其适应当前解码上下文，从而在不重放令牌的情况下实现高效的视觉回溯。实验证明该方法在加速推理的同时保持生成质量。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 交错多模态推理中重用历史视觉KV缓存可以避免重复前向计算，但现有方法因缓存中位置绑定信息过时而导致注意力错乱甚至解码崩溃。本文提出位置重绑定缓存重用方法，通过调整缓存中的位置编码使其适应当前解码上下文，从而在不重放令牌的情况下实现高效的视觉回溯。实验证明该方法在加速推理的同时保持生成质量。

deep_dive.title: Forget Without Compromise: Nexus Sampling for Streaming KV-Cache Eviction Under Fixed Budgets
deep_dive.abstract: Long-context and agentic LLM workloads push the KV cache past any fixed memory budget, forcing the inference stack to permanently evict tokens at every step of a continuous-inference stream. Existing methods all share the same template, a per-step direct-attention score followed by deterministic top-$K$ selection, which converts a single below-cutoff step into an irreversible verdict and permanently erases any subtly important token that direct attention cannot single out from noise. To address this challenge, we propose Nexus Sampling, a training-free eviction method that pairs Nexus scoring, an iterative walk over direct attention that surfaces bridge tokens, with weighted reservoir sampling, which retains tokens with inclusion probability in place of deterministic top-$K$. Theoretically, we show that Nexus Sampling dominates deterministic top-$K$ in long-run survival of subtly important tokens. Empirically, at 80% KV cache eviction, Nexus Sampling matches dense attention within 1% on LongBench while outperforming top-$K$ baselines on retrieval-heavy tasks, with up to 10x smaller per-sequence cache memory.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: proposes Nexus Sampling for KV cache eviction, directly addressing LLM inference memory efficiency
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 提出Nexus采样用于KV缓存驱逐，直接解决LLM推理内存效率问题
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 提出Nexus采样用于KV缓存驱逐，直接解决LLM推理内存效率问题
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 提出Nexus采样用于KV缓存驱逐，直接解决LLM推理内存效率问题
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Nexus Sampling: a training-free eviction method using iterative attention walk and weighted reservoir sampling to retain important tokens under fixed KV cache budget, improving streaming LLM inference.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 长上下文LLM推理中KV缓存常超出固定内存预算，现有基于直接注意力分数的确定性驱逐方法易永久擦除重要令牌。本文提出Nexus采样，一种免训练驱逐方法，通过迭代遍历注意力进行Nexus评分发现桥接令牌，并结合加权水库采样保留关键令牌。实验表明，在固定缓存预算下，该方法能更有效保留重要令牌，提升流式推理性能。Nexus采样为LLM高效推理中的KV缓存管理提供了鲁棒且免训练的新方案。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 长上下文LLM推理中KV缓存常超出固定内存预算，现有基于直接注意力分数的确定性驱逐方法易永久擦除重要令牌。本文提出Nexus采样，一种免训练驱逐方法，通过迭代遍历注意力进行Nexus评分发现桥接令牌，并结合加权水库采样保留关键令牌。实验表明，在固定缓存预算下，该方法能更有效保留重要令牌，提升流式推理性能。Nexus采样为LLM高效推理中的KV缓存管理提供了鲁棒且免训练的新方案。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Papers central to 大语言模型高效推理相关的论文检索, especially work that connects or combines: efficient large language model inference techniques; KV cache optimization and management for LLM; speculative decoding for faster LLM inference; structured and unstructured pruning for LLMs; efficient attention mechanisms like FlashAttention or PagedAttention; survey on efficient inference of large language models; state of the art techniques for LLM inference acceleration; optimizing throughput and latency for LLM serving.

deep_dive.title: UniFS: Unified Fast-to-Slow Hierarchical Architecture for Vision-Language-Action Models
deep_dive.abstract: Mainstream Fast-Slow dual system vision-language-action models decouple a high-frequency action expert from a low-frequency vision-language model for efficiency, yet they face a fundamental frequency dilemma: large update gaps cause semantic drift from stale context, while small gaps erode the intended computational savings. Moreover, because the action expert receives only the VLM's final-layer representation at a single fixed frequency, rich intermediate features are discarded, limiting both information coupling and manipulation precision. Inspired by multi-timescale neural processing in the human brain, we introduce UniFS, a unified fast-to-slow architecture that resolves these challenges through three key designs. First, we stratify the VLM layers into groups with progressively decreasing update frequencies, enabling shallow layers to capture fast-changing dynamics while deeper layers cache stable semantic context. Second, a latent vector inversion mechanism re-routes the interaction order between multi-scale VLM features and the action expert, aligning fast-varying representations with fine-grained action decoding and slow-varying ones with coarse planning. Third, a multi-level supervision strategy enforces a coarse-to-fine learning hierarchy across temporal scales. Together, these designs enable richer cross-frequency information transfer within a single backbone, while the low-frequency pathways additionally preserve temporal context across steps. Experiments on LIBERO show that UniFS achieves state-of-the-art performance (98.3\% average success rate, a 2.5\% gain over VLA-Adapter baseline) while reducing average inference latency from 36.5~ms to 17.8~ms (2.1$\times$ speedup). Real-robot experiments on a Franka platform further validate its practical applicability. Code is opensourced at https://github.com/linsun449/UniFS.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: fast-to-slow architecture for vision-language-action model efficiency
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 用于视觉-语言-动作模型效率的快慢架构
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 用于视觉-语言-动作模型效率的快慢架构
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 用于视觉-语言-动作模型效率的快慢架构
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: UniFS proposes a unified fast-to-slow hierarchical architecture for vision-language-action models to resolve the frequency dilemma and improve efficiency in manipulation tasks.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对视觉-语言-动作模型在推理加速中面临的频率困境，即大更新间隔导致语义漂移、小间隔丧失计算节省，本文提出统一快慢分层架构UniFS，通过分层特征整合和多频率调度，在保持精度的同时显著提升推理效率，实验验证了其在机器人操作任务上的加速效果。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对视觉-语言-动作模型在推理加速中面临的频率困境，即大更新间隔导致语义漂移、小间隔丧失计算节省，本文提出统一快慢分层架构UniFS，通过分层特征整合和多频率调度，在保持精度的同时显著提升推理效率，实验验证了其在机器人操作任务上的加速效果。

quick_skim.title: Edges Before Embeddings: A Confidence-Aware Blur Gate for Vision-Language Pipelines
quick_skim.abstract: Production vision pipelines silently degrade on blurry input, wasting compute on downstream OCR, retrieval, and vision-language model (VLM) calls that cannot recover a usable output. We present MagikaDocumentFromPixel, a lightweight, CPU-friendly image quality gate that classifies a single image as sharp, blurred, or uncertain in roughly 7 ms on a single CPU core. The contributions are (i) a recipe selected from a 46-configuration, 8-sweep empirical search that isolates input resolution as the dominant lever and shows architecture capacity only pays off at >= 384 px; (ii) a confidence-aware routing formalism grounded in classical selective prediction; (iii) the Edge Prior Module (EPM), a Laplacian-magnitude auxiliary input channel that gives the network direct access to the spectral evidence that classical blur heuristics rely on and that lifts test F1 by +1.3 points in a matched-env comparison; and (iv) an observation that the gate is one instance of a recurring design pattern that appears independently in Magika content-type detection, risk-controlled OCR with VLMs, and DocVLM. The final recipe MobileNetV3-Large with the EPM trained at 384x384 on paired GoPro Large frames, evaluated with 5-scale test-time augmentation reaches F1 = 0.9803 (AUC 0.9989) with a 17 MB ONNX artifact, improving over our fixed-scale baseline on the same hardware (F1 = 0.9672) by +1.31 points. We are explicit about limitations: results are on a single motion-blur distribution, numbers are from a single seed, and calibration is qualitative rather than measured.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Lightweight blur gate to filter bad inputs and save compute for VLM pipelines
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 轻量级模糊门控过滤劣质输入，节省VLM管线计算资源
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 轻量级模糊门控过滤劣质输入，节省VLM管线计算资源
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 轻量级模糊门控过滤劣质输入，节省VLM管线计算资源
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a CPU-friendly blur detection gate that quickly identifies blurry images to avoid wasteful VLM inference.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对生产环境视觉管线中模糊输入浪费计算的问题，提出了一个轻量级的CPU友好图像质量门控MagikaDocumentFromPixel。该门控在约7毫秒内分类图像清晰度，并基于选择性预测进行置信度感知路由。在多种VLM任务上，该方法能有效避免因模糊输入导致的无效推理，显著提升整体管线效率。该工作为VLM实际部署提供了实用的预处理优化。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文针对生产环境视觉管线中模糊输入浪费计算的问题，提出了一个轻量级的CPU友好图像质量门控MagikaDocumentFromPixel。该门控在约7毫秒内分类图像清晰度，并基于选择性预测进行置信度感知路由。在多种VLM任务上，该方法能有效避免因模糊输入导致的无效推理，显著提升整体管线效率。该工作为VLM实际部署提供了实用的预处理优化。
